name: EndorLabsScan
description: Azure Pipelines Task for Endor Labs
author: cp-endor

inputs.name: serviceConnectionEndpoint
inputs.label: Endorlabs service connection end point
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose Endor Labs service connection from your Azure DevOps project settings.

inputs.name: namespace
inputs.label: Namespace name in Endor
inputs.helpMarkDown: Set to the namespace of the project that you are working with.

inputs.name: additionalArgs
inputs.label: Additional command-line args for endorctl CLI
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional command-line args for endorctl CLI

inputs.name: enableDetachedRefName
inputs.label: Enable detached-ref-name flag
inputs.helpMarkDown: Automatically add --detached-ref-name with source branch name to endorctl command. Default: true

inputs.name: scanContainer
inputs.label: Scan a container image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable container image scanning using 'endorctl container scan'. Cannot be used with scanDependencies.

inputs.name: image
inputs.label: Container image to scan
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify the container image to scan (e.g., myregistry/myimage:tag). Required when scanContainer is true.

inputs.name: osReachability
inputs.label: Enable OS reachability analysis
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable OS reachability analysis for the container scan.

inputs.name: dockerfilePath
inputs.label: Dockerfile path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify the Dockerfile path used to build the image being scanned.

inputs.name: baseImageName
inputs.label: Base image name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify the base image name of the image being scanned.

inputs.name: baseImageScan
inputs.label: Scan base image
inputs.helpMarkDown: Scan the base image if identified and not previously scanned.

inputs.name: imageType
inputs.label: Image type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify image type to skip auto-detection.

inputs.name: outputType
inputs.label: Output type for container scan
inputs.helpMarkDown: Set output format for container scan results.

inputs.name: findingTags
inputs.label: Finding tags
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated list of user-defined tags to add to findings generated for objects in this scan scope.

inputs.name: projectTags
inputs.label: Project tags
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated list of user-defined tags to add to this project.
